ogTitle: Pambula vs Pambula Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pambula and Pambula Beach.
heading: Pambula vs Pambula Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pambula, New South Wales and Pambula Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pambula Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pambula (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pambula or Pambula Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pambula has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Pambula Beach scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pambula scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Pambula Beach scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pambula or Pambula Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pambula Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
